title: Duck's mobs
description: a mod that adds more animals and items. Let's go explore the nature!!
body:
ducks mobs is a mod that ad many animals and creatures to the game:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15ea2b22abd5c9dd625e742f3ce8c2070087c5a1.png)
## passive mobs
- duck: you can tame it with cooked salmon!
- deer: you can hunt it to win a trophy!
- catterpillar: you can extract his poison to make a health boost potion!
- butterfly: he is beautiful!
- the pangolin: he spawn in deserts!
## agressive mobs
### the copper boss
- you can spawn it with left click in a cursed copper block!
- he is very fast,good luck!
- if you beat it he drops a copper hammer!!
  ![copper boss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2ed70da4ca96f0421424764945d48ca2c95b427.png)


discover the rest of the mod!!
